series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Organized Crime Investigations Commission (OOCIC) Member Files
series_metadata.series_description: Documents the official appointment of members to the OOCIC by the Ohio Governor. Records include, but are not limited to, initial application to serve on the commission, commission member oath to office, appointments, and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: from last date serving on commission. ; Paper: from last date serving on commission, unless scanned and saved electronically
